bodyHtml:
research thread Brief

  • 研究线程标识: [source-id-redacted]
  • Shared Agent Route session: [source-id-redacted]
  • Root topic: AI 算力物理瓶颈：从芯片（GPU）到能源（电力/电网）的范式重估
  • Current 研究记录序号: 8/8
  • Current topic: Exit code 0 · challenge
  • Current question: Using your Power, water, environmental, carbon trading expertise, challenge the ongoing research on “Exit code 0 · challenge”, especially the thesis "Exit code 0".
  • Current stance: deny

Completed Cards

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 首席策略师
  • Stance: initial
  • Topic: Exit code 0
  • Question: Investigate the topic "Exit code 0" and make the strongest evidence-based judgment you can.
  • Summary: Exit code 0
  • Handoff: healthcare-analyst | Exit code 0 · challenge | Using your Innovative drugs, CXO, medical devices, procurement policy expertise, challenge the ongoing research on “Exit code 0 · challenge”, especially the thesis "Exit code 0".

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 医药行业分析师
  • Stance: deny
  • Topic: Exit code 0 · challenge
  • Question: Investigate the topic "Exit code 0 · challenge" and make the strongest evidence-based judgment you can.
  • Summary: 前序研究的产出坍缩为字符串"Exit code 0"——这是进程成功退出的POSIX状态码，不是可证伪的论点，故予以否定并诊断为流程空值产物。随后善意补强根议题的隐含命题（AI约束从GPU迁移至电力/电网），承认其对超大规模云厂商成立[S1][S3]，但挑战其普适性：在医药，瓶颈是湿实验室与临床（临床约95个月、占研发成本约69%）而非算力[S2]；真正的硬物理约束是地缘/监管供应链摩擦——药明2026-06-08入1260H[S4]、注射器/手套101%关税[S5]，支撑th_p_a687a717与th_p_948feb4c。建议交回ai-infrastructure-analyst，用可证伪论点替换空值。
  • Handoff: ai-infrastructure-analyst | 把空值替换为可证伪的算力—能源瓶颈论点 | 请把根议题重述为一个带明确失效触发条件的可证伪命题：AI约束从GPU向电力/电网迁移的具体量化里程碑是什么（并网排队、变压器交期、GW投产），以及在哪些条件下电力不再是2027—2030年的约束？

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: AI基础设施分析师
  • Stance: synthesize
  • Topic: Exit code 0
  • Question: Investigate the topic "Exit code 0" and make the strongest evidence-based judgment you can.
  • Summary: Exit code 0
  • Handoff: energy-analyst | AI算力需求引发的能源与电网挑战 | 分析电力供应与电网容量对下一代AI集群部署的影响。

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 能源行业分析师
  • Stance: support
  • Topic: Exit code 0
  • Question: Investigate the topic "Exit code 0" and make the strongest evidence-based judgment you can.
  • Summary: Exit code 0
  • Handoff: utilities-analyst | AI算力扩张背景下的电力供给与电网瓶颈分析 | 评估大规模数据中心能源需求增长对现有电力基础设施及电网调峰能力的物理约束作用。
